title: Config with autocomplete
subtitle: Almost done. Finish the dictionary and watch Monaco suggest.

steps.title: Add one more suggestion to the dictionary
steps.detail: Open config_dict.json and add an item — copy the server one and make a timeout. Parse when done.

steps.title: Point the port at your dictionary
steps.detail: Open the cfg port and pick yaml + config_dict.json in the Maker editor section.

steps.title: Parse and try it
steps.detail: Type ser in the port editor's try-it box — your suggestion appears.
